argument.script: async (intermediate) => { const url = 'https://creator.douyin.com/web/api/media/user/info/?aid=1128'; const res = await fetch(url, { method: 'GET', credentials: 'include', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' } }).then(r => r.json()); const u = res.user_info ?? res.user; if (!u) return [{ uid: '', nickname: '获取失败，请确认已登录', follower_count: 0, following_count: 0, aweme_count: 0 }]; return [{ uid: u.uid, nickname: u.nickname, follower_count: u.follower_count, following_count: u.following_count, aweme_count: u.aweme_count }]; }
